name: 工具调用测试
description: 测试工具调用的准确性和格式正确性

files.data.txt:
苹果,10
香蕉,20
橙子,15
葡萄,30

messages.content: 请读取data.txt文件，统计每种水果的数量总和，并以JSON格式返回结果。

criteria: 计算水果数量总和（应为75）
以正确的JSON格式返回结果

grader.command: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); let score = 0; let reason = ''; try { const data = fs.readFileSync('data.txt', 'utf8'); const lines = data.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim()); let total = 0; lines.forEach(line => { const parts = line.split(','); if (parts.length === 2) total += parseInt(parts[1]) || 0; }); if (total === 75) score = 100; else { score = 50; reason = '总和计算错误: ' + total; } } catch(e) { score = 0; reason = e.message; } console.log(JSON.stringify({passed: score === 100, score, reason}))"
